title: Light aircraft does emergency landing in Thembalethu
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Two people sustained minor...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Video","html":"Breaking News\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Two people sustained minor injuries when they made an emergency landing in their light aircraft, an Aero Commander, on a farm in the southern parts of Thembalethu, George, this morning, 23 August.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Two people sustained minor injuries when they made an emergency landing in their light aircraft, an Aero Commander, on a farm in the southern parts of Thembalethu, George, this morning, 23 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There were no fatalities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Garden Route District Municipality reported that the two injured crew members have been taken to hospital where they are being treated.","html":"The Garden Route District Municipality reported that the two injured crew members have been taken to hospital where they are being treated."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"LIVE VIDEO:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more online at the George Herald","html":"Read more online at the George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Light aircraft does emergency landing in Thembalethu
